creator: tmseck@netcologne.de
text:
Create a new port www/squid30 -- a development snapshot of the
upcoming Squid 3.0.  This port is based on the latest PRE6-tarball
and adds all applicable patches as of 2007-05-29 that are published on
<http://www.squid-cache.org/Versions/v3/3.0/changesets/>. The port's
version number is derived from the date of the latest integrated
patchset.

Note that Squid 3.0 is a bit odd as that it adds some new features
(most notably integrated ICAP support) but lacks some 2.6 features,
eg Follow-XFF.

The patch submitted is a patch against www/squid; I can provide a shar
archive of the port if this is desired in this case.

The following files need to be removed from CVS:

- files/icap-2.6-bootstrap.patch
- files/icap-2.6-core.patch
- files/patch-aa

Fix: Apply this patch after repocopying www/squid to www/squid30:
